name: Vauban
description: Vauban is the model of innovative technology. He deploys clever inventions to provide crowd control. His tenacity and focus make him formidable.
passiveDescription: Deal x|DAMAGE| Damage to incapacitated enemies.

abilities.name: Tesla Nervos
abilities.description: Deploy a roller drone that attaches itself to enemies and delivers bursts of arcing <DT_ELECTRICITY_COLOR> Electricity Damage to anything in the immediate area.

abilities.name: Minelayer
abilities.description:
Control the battlefield with masterful mines. Vauban's Tether-Flechette orb immobilizes and draws in enemies while launching deadly nails in all directions.

HOLD to launch a Vector-Overdrive pad that accelerates foes and allies alike in the pad's direction, increasing ally Movement Speed and Weapon Damage.

abilities.name: Photon Strike
abilities.description: Drop a targeting beacon that calls in a devastating laser artillery strike. Deals doubled damage to enemies with Overguard.

abilities.name: Bastille
abilities.description:
Erect a containment field to capture enemies and suspend them in stasis, stripping their armor and granting it to Vauban and any allies within Bastille's field.

HOLD to collapse all Bastilles into a single damaging vortex.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Vauban is the model of innovative technology. He deploys clever inventions to provide crowd control. His tenacity and focus make him formidable.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Vauban Warframe.

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Vauban Warframe.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Vauban Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.2

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Hotfix 31.1.2

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.4

patchlogs.name: Star Days: Hotfix 29.8.1

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.5 + 29.5.5.1

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.2

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed “LotusWarframeCustomization” appearing instead of “No Ephemera Selected” on Vauban/Vauban Prime in the Arsenal. 
Fixed the FX brightness level being far too intense when several of Vauban’s Bastilles are cast, to the point where it would cover the entire screen.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix: 29.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Updated Ivara's Quiver, Vauban's Minelayer, Xaku's The Lost, and Titania's Tribute ability descriptions to list the sub-abilities and a brief general description of what they do. Tips related to these sub-abilities for each Warframe have also been edited for accuracy as a result.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.8 + 29.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban’s coattails missing the PBR treatment. He should match/blend much better now! As reported here!

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.6
patchlogs.changes: Added HUD timers to Vauban’s Minelayer grenades.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave Series 3: Glassmaker: Update 27.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban’s Nervos not reflecting chosen Skin overrides for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban’s Flechette Orb being destroyed if thrown into a Mutalist Quanta orb.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.16
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Grendel being able to Feast on Vauban’s deployed traps; a snack that contains no nutritional daily value.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Vauban: 50 to 150
Vauban Prime: 100 to 200
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban’s Tesla Nervos roller drones stuttering in the Railjack.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Prime Vault 27.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Vauban Prime and Ash Prime, as well as their signature Prime Weapons, Accessories, have reentered the Prime Vault and have been removed from the drop tables.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.12 + 27.0.12.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies being immune to Vauban’s Bastille if they were ragdolled out of it previously.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Hotfix 27.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script crash that could occur from Vauban’s Minelayer ability.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Hotfix 27.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Vauban’s Minelayer ability.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Update 27
patchlogs.fixes: Vauban’s Flechette Orb Damage multiplier now scales based on average enemy level in range.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Update 26.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed certain enemies (mostly Hyekkas, Drahks, and Feral Kavats/Kubrows) having poor hit detection while held in Vauban's Bastille.
Fixed Atlas being unaffected by Vauban's Vector Pads. Rocks gotta go fast too.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.4 + 26.0.4.1
patchlogs.changes: Increased the casting speed of Vauban’s Tesla Nervos’ and Orbital Strike.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.additions: Fixed a script error when casting Vauban’s Minelayer ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.changes:
Welcome to Update 26: The Old Blood! It’s a hefty read below that we appreciate you taking the time to go through. Before you get started, you can look forward to a friendly in-game Inbox message with a few items from us to you. We know you’ve put a lot of time and resources into some of the things we’re changing (Melee, Vauban, Ember, etc), so please enjoy these free items by logging in before December 31st 11:59PM ET:
When revisiting Vauban, we aimed to retain his status as a crowd control powerhouse, while increasing his mobility and lethality to keep up with 2019 Warframe’s lightning-quick pace.
Vauban’s two marquee powers have been combined into a new and devastating ultimate ability!
Overall, many of Vauban’s powers have been streamlined or replaced, making his tools less redundant, and much more versatile for keeping up with the pace of an average Warframe mission.
*Vauban and Ember have been removed from Conclave in the meantime for balancing.

patchlogs.name: TennoGen & Nightwave Episode 5: Hotfix 25.7.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban Prime's coat tails not being replaced by the regular non-Prime coat tails when toggling his ‘Prime Details’.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zanuka being unable to capture Hildryn, Wisp, Revenant, Chroma, Frost, Excalibur, Inaros, Nova, Vauban, Volt, Wukong, Ash, Hydroid, Mag, Trinity, Titania and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.changes: Balance is a conversation that we constantly have, and we see you having as well. For some people the answer is don't nerf things, buff everything else. This is the path of least resistance for us, as most of the player base is happy when we buff, and angry when we nerf. However this has a few side effects that impact the game as a whole. First, with more damage, the time to kill on enemies is lowered and the value of Crowd Control declines even more (Vauban?!). Higher max damage also means that players with the latest bells and whistles can easily kill bosses in an instant, and overcome any challenge with ease. The more your play, the easier the game gets!

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed multiple Warframe abilities (Nidus’ Larva, Vauban’s Vortex, etc) breaking due to a script error occurring when an AI recovered from a ragdolled state as reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1032142-nidus-larva-bugging-out-fix-pending/?page=11&tab=comments#comment-10334248

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed issues with Vauban's Citadel Axe Skin now showing proper open/closed states when browsing. This also fixes a similar problem with the Silva and Aegis. 
Fixed Vauban Citadel Skin and some Syandanas having invisible collision which caused them to float or get twisted when equipped.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of Vauban's Tesla in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.3.2
patchlogs.changes: Increased the scale of Vauban’s Mortier Heavy Blade Skin!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban’s Citadel Skin Channeling FX covering his whole body.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23.3.0 + 23.3.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Vauban's Passive has changed! Vauban's new passive: "Deal 25% extra damage to incapacitated enemies". 
Whether by Vauban's own CC'ing abilities, or the abilities of others, Vauban can amplify his damage against the incapacitated!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban Prime missing his new Passive description.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Zephyr Prime 22.16.4
patchlogs.changes: Vauban Prime, Fragor Prime and Akstiletto Prime have entered the Prime Vault, and their Relics are no longer be obtainable in the game.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.12.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed switching to Operator and back causing some abilities (e.g. Fireball, Vauban 1/3/4) to cost twice as much Energy.
Fixed Vauban’s Bounce trap sending victims horizontal instead of straight up.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Warframe Specters are now much smarter! If you don't recall, Specters are craftable gear you can equip to summon an AI companion in battle. We've done a general intelligence pass on their proficiency with Weapons, and we've also updated their power-casting logic. Virtually every power is now castable with only a few exceptions! Specters CANNOT cast the following Abilities: Vauban's Minelayer, Ivara's Zipline, Titania's Razorwing, Nekros’ Desecrate and Shadows of the Dead, Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Valkyr’s Hysteria, Wukong’s Primal Fury, Cloud Walker, and Defy, Atlas’ Petrify and Tectonics, Limbo's entire kit (save for the damage aspect of Banish), and finally Zephyr’s Dive Bomb.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Shred decreasing Vauban's armour instead of the enemies'.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Vauban’s Minelayer ability.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Only 2 of Vauban’s Minelayer can be active at a time in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Duration removed from Vauban's Tesla deployables and a max of 2 deployed at once added in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Melee combo counter overlapping Nidus, Vauban, and Ivara’s ability UI indicators.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Vauban’s Vortex sometimes spontaneously killing enemies. 
Fixed Nidina Shoulder Plates clipping on Vauban Prime.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban's Vortex not affecting ragdolled enemies.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes: Fixed an issue with the flashing reticule hitmaker during Vauban’s Vortex, and Nezha’s Blazing Chakram and Warding Halo.

patchlogs.name: The Pacifism Defect: Hotfix 19.12.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban’s Bastille and Vortex lingering in tiles after players have left said tile.This resulted in enemies continually being damaged or immobile even after the ability ended.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a seam/texture issue on the Vauban Suppressor Skin.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.5.4
patchlogs.changes: Nidus’ Larva no longer latches enemies trapped in Vauban’s Bastille.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Hotfix 19.3.2 + 19.3.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a couple memory leaks and offset damage triggers with Vauban’s Tesla Link Augment Mod.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Hotfix 19.3.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed memory/object leak with Vauban's Vortex and Simulor.
Fixed a rare script crash in Vauban's Tesla if the entity it attached to was killed within a quarter-second of attachment.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Vauban’s Bastille FX remaining indefinitely upon Host migration.
Fixed Vauban's passive, Reinforce, not applying after being revived and until a player enters or exits the radius.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #2
patchlogs.changes: Excluded Reactant and Index Point pickups from Simulor, Inaros' Sandstorm, Zephyr Tornado, and Vauban's Vortex. This also fixes the exception lists for the Simulor; it wasn't supposed to be moving  gameplay objects (eg Datamass, Excavation Power Cells, Raptor Cells, etc) but it generally wasn't of a problem because the objects were heavy enough (properly excluding them should run faster too!). As more and more gameplay components rely on pickups, we've addressed this issue as it is commonly discussed by you all.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes:
Conclave Arsenal now has Ability descriptions specific to Conclave for the following Frames: Ash, Banshee, Hydroid, Inaros, Ivara, Loki, Mag, Mesa, Nekros, Nezha, Nova, Nyx, Rhino, Saryn, Titania, Valkyr, Vauban and Volt.
Vauban’s Trip Wire grenade now has two beams, is deployed immediately on release, not affected by gravity and duration removed in Conclave.
Vauban’s Shred mine damage increased and armor debuff is now permanent in Conclave.
Vauban’s Concussion grenade silence debuff duration increased in Conclave.
All of Vauban’s deployables are now destructible in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed a script crash with Vauban’s passive when all allies in range are dead.
Fixed Vauban Bastille and Vortex balls being auto-destroyed a second after they collided with something.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 3 (Nekros Prime!)
patchlogs.changes: the Nyx Prime Neuroptics will be replaced with Vauban Prime Neuroptics and Scindo Prime Blade will be replaced with Nikana Prime Blade.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the size of Vauban’s Tesla traps in Conclave.
Vauban’s Bastille now works on Corpus air units. (Attack Drones, etc.)
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue with Vauban's Bastille Visual FX staying active if the Host is killed within a Client's Bastille in Conclave.
Fixed Corpus Techs having bad collision when suspended via Vauban's Bastille.

patchlogs.name: Update: Lunaro
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Vauban’s Tesla not being affected by Power Strength Mods as a Client.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.13.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed multiple Bastille’s appearing when casted by Vauban in Mag’s Polarize.
Fixed Mag’s Magnetize bubble lingering permanently when Vauban’s Vortex/Bastille is thrown inside it. This also fixes intensified FX in this situation that caused performance issues.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed hearing Vauban’s Bastille sound effect across the map when the Repelling Bastille Mod is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.12.2
patchlogs.changes: Hotfix 18.12.2: Vauban Prime:
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed numerous Syandana placement issues on Vauban Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.12.0: Vauban Prime & 18.12.1
patchlogs.additions:
Outmaneuver your enemies with the deadly expertise of Vauban Prime Access!
Get Vauban Prime Access now and make the newest Prime yours 
including Vauban Prime, Fragor Prime, Akstiletto Prime, and exclusive Customizations only available through Prime Access!
For information on where to start hunting for Vauban Prime and his gear, see here:
patchlogs.changes:
Update 18.12.0: Vauban Prime:
Fixed casting Vauban’s Concuss grenade disabling your powers until you died in Conclaves.
Fixed seeing Vauban’s Minelayer power icons while loading into the Conclaves.
Reduced the Oxium crafting cost for Vauban Prime Chassis to 7,000.
patchlogs.fixes:
•    Fixed certain enemies continuing their slowed animation after being released from Vauban’s Bastille. 
•    Fixed Power Strength Mods (Blind Rage, Intensify, etc.) not applying very much to Vauban’s Vortex initial blast and damage over time.
Fixed Vauban’s Immortal skin equipping incorrectly on Vauban Prime.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Kavat’s not being levitated by Vauban’s Bastille.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Increased the duration of Vauban’s Vortex in Conclave.
Vauban’s Bounce will no longer bounce boss-type enemies.
Vauban’s Bastille will slow boss-type enemies instead of lifting and placing them in stasis.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.10 & Tactial Alert: Divine Will
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an error causing Vauban’s Bastille to continue indefinitely if the ability was active before Vauban revived.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Vauban, Mirage, Nekros, and Limbo are now available for use in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban’s Tesla hanging in mid air after being attached to an enemy that has died.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.10.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ember's Fireblast, Vauban's Vortex and Volt's Electric Shield Abilities being cancelled when you enter a Nullifier Bubble.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Slightly adjusted the visual FX on Vauban’s Abilities.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: This helmet is worn by Vauban, and increases velocity of parkour maneuvers, with a reduction to Power Duration.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Tenno, show your true colors with new Customizations! Give the outside of your Liset some flare with new Skins, style Vauban with a new Alternate Helmet and add power to your Warframes with new Ability Augments Mods.
ARMISITICE VAUBAN HELMET: Add this uniquely-styled helmet to your Arsenal and give Vauban a new look.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some of Vauban’s powers only lasting for 1 second as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/456530-vauban-abilities-only-last-a-few-moments/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban’s Perpetual Vortex Mod no longer pulling in enemies after the initial Vortex time has ended.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.3 + 16.3.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Vauban

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Increased Vauban’s Bounce Pad duration to 5 minutes (from 15 seconds).

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.additions: Banshee and Vauban Noggles have been added to the Market!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed enemies not becoming released from Vauban’s Bastille when a Nullifier bubble passes over them.
Fixed Vauban’s Vortex not properly gathering nearby items.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.7+15.5.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed performance issues that would occur in long sessions where Vauban's Vortex was often used, resulting in FPS issues.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Vauban’s Ability grenades have received their own unique texture!

patchlogs.name: Update 15.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Vauban’s Tesla beam from the Tesla Link Mod has received an improved visual effect to reduce visual clutter when cast multiple times and
Vauban’s Tesla beam from the Tesla Link Mod should now properly deal Slash damage.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ability screen not showing stats for Ember Fireball, Frost Freeze, or Vauban's abilities.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Vauban's Bounce resulting in spamming "0" Magnetic Damage to enemies. Bounce will now properly deal damage to enemies.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.9.0
patchlogs.changes: Improved performance on the visual effects of Vauban’s Bastille for longer durations in an effort to reduce crashes.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.8.0: Nyx Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban's Bastille slowly deteriorating frame-rate each time it was cast. Thanks to Test Clan Please Ignore for helping isolate the problem.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.7.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Vauban's Bounce and Vortex appearing with default energy colour for clients.
Optimized visual effects on Vauban's Tesla grenades for lower end hardware.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.7.0: Operation Gate Crash!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where enemies caught in Vauban’s Vortex will oscillate and vibrate in an unappealing way.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.changes: • Made Vauban's Vortex scale with power range and duration mods.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11

Reduced the duration of Vauban's Vortex in Dark Sector conflicts.
Vauban's Bastille no longer affects downed players in Dark Sector conflicts.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban’s Vortex effect not appearing in same position as Vortex Ball.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.5.0: Edo Armor & Nami Solo

patchlogs.name: Update 13.3.0: Pack Hunters
patchlogs.changes:
Vauban’s Bastille
Vauban’s Vortex
Tweaked the ability and energy visuals on numerous Warframes including Rhino, Frost, Nova, Ash, Banshee, Zephyr, Vauban, Volt and Valkyr.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.6+13.0.7+13.0.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Vauban's Bounce ability not working correctly.

patchlogs.name: Update 13: Dark Sectors
patchlogs.changes: Improved the performance and Apex visuals of Vauban's Vortex ability.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zephyr’s Tornado and Vauban’s Vortex being able to ragdoll harder enemies (Mini-bosses like Stalker, etc). The Tornado will still deal DOT, but it won’t ragdoll. It is now consistent with other ragdoll-esque powers.

patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban’s Tesla’s not being destroyed in between Conclave matches.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues where Vauban’s Tesla could cause a crash. We have optimized the FX of this power for performance and stability, it may look a bit different!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed crash that could occur when using Vauban's Tesla

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban’s Vortex not ragdolling enemies.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.9.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed performance issues when using Vauban's Vortex in situations with high enemy counts.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed issues with throwing direction associated with Vauban’s powers.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with Vauban’s Vortex causing crashes when dealing damage.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.5.0: The Gradivus Dilemma
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Vauban’s Bounce ability that caused friendly AI to play perpetual falling animation.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Infested chargers and ancients not being appropriately affected by Vauban’s Vortex ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.8
patchlogs.changes:
Vauban: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/102832-vauban-98-feedback-thread/
Energy color tinting for Vauban’s Tesla and Vortex abilities.
Vauban’s Tesla ability now has reduced FX on projectiles attached to players.
PvP Dueling – Vauban’s Bounce ability now does damage.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Vauban's powers not working when stuck onto Frost's Snowglobe.
Fixed bad cases with Vauban’s Tesla, Bounce, and Bastille that would occur when the instigator player would die/respawn/leave the game.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vortex damaging teammates if a player using Vauban casts it then disconnects

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Vauban Vortex preventing revives in squad.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Vauban’s Vortex killing friendlies if owner dies and respawns.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.2: Tenno Reinforcement
patchlogs.fixes:
Fix for Vauban’s abilities not working if thrown on Orokin ice trap.
Fix for Vauban’s Tesla not activating if tossed onto a Grineer Shield Lancer’s shield.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.4: Hit Me With Your Best Hot(Fix).
patchlogs.fixes: Vauban powers now working as intended. A bug prevented the physics of most skills to work properly.
